title: NinjaTom Project Site Manifest
description: Metadata used by the NinjaTom Apps master site to render a project card.

tagline.description: Short one-sentence summary shown on the project card.

category.description: Display category, for example iOS App, Web App, Game, Tool, or Creative / Custom3D.

status.description: Project status badge, for example Live, Beta, TestFlight, Coming Soon, or Archived.

icon.description: Absolute URL for an app icon or project mark.

previewImage.description: Optional absolute URL for a card preview image or screenshot.

previewImageAlt.description: Accessible alt text for the preview image.

screenshots.description: Optional screenshots displayed in the master site's project detail drawer.

alt.description: Accessible alt text for the screenshot.

caption.description: Short visible caption shown below the screenshot.

launchedAt.description: Optional launch date used for Recently Launched filtering and RSS metadata.

version.description: Optional public version or launch label shown in the project detail drawer.

launchNotes.description: Optional launch or release note shown in the project detail drawer and RSS feed.

versionHighlights.description: Optional short highlights shown under launch notes in the project detail drawer.

projectedReleaseDate.description: Optional manual projected App Store or public release date. Used only when appStoreUrl is blank.

progressPercent.description: Optional release-progress override from 0 to 100. If omitted, the hub estimates progress from public project signals.

releaseProjectionNote.description: Optional note shown in the release projection drawer section.

accent.description: Six-digit hex accent color for the card.

featured.description: Featured projects are sorted before non-featured projects.

sortOrder.description: Lower numbers appear first within the featured/non-featured group.

examples.name: DoorCodes
examples.tagline: Access codes, ready on arrival with privacy-safe reminders and Secure Reveal.
examples.previewImageAlt: DoorCodes website preview for the upgraded access-code app site.

screenshots.alt: DoorCodes social preview artwork with the app icon and access-code imagery.
screenshots.caption: Launch preview

examples.launchNotes: DoorCodes is live with App Store, support, privacy, and launch artwork connected.
